tools.name: solknife_mint_supply_build
d289909bd98195d4e00
tools.description: Read a mint's current mint + freeze authorities and whether `owner` holds either.

tools.name: solknife_change_authority_read
tools.description: Read a mint's current mint + freeze authorities and whether `owner` holds either (before transferring one).

tools.name: solknife_token_metadata_read
tools.description: Read a mint's current on-chain Metaplex metadata and whether `owner` can update it.

tools.name: solknife_burn_nft_list
tools.description: List a wallet's NFT assets (DAS).

tools.name: solknife_reclaim_rent_list
tools.description: List a wallet's reclaimable empty token accounts.

tools.name: solknife_ct_state
tools.description: Read confidential-transfer state for owner + mint (mint extension flags, account configured, balance ciphertexts).

tools.name: solknife_ct_orphans_list
tools.description: List a wallet's orphan ZK Proof context-state accounts (left by partial Withdraw or Transfer sagas).

tools.name: solknife_create_mint_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned create-mint tx. Returns the base64 v0 transaction + lastValidBlockHeight + derived mint address.

tools.name: solknife_mint_supply_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned mint-to tx. `amount` is a whole-token decimal string; the builder parses it against the mint's decimals.

tools.name: solknife_revoke_authority_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned revoke-authority tx (mint and/or freeze). Permanent on-chain.

tools.name: solknife_change_authority_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned change-authority tx: transfer the mint and/or freeze authority to newAuthority. The new authority is pinned in the tx the client verifies before signing.

tools.name: solknife_token_metadata_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned set/update Metaplex metadata tx. `lock` makes the metadata immutable (irreversible).

tools.name: solknife_create_account_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned ATA-create tx (idempotent) for one or more mints.

tools.name: solknife_reclaim_rent_build
tools.description: Build chunked close-batch tx(s) for the wallet's empty token accounts. Up to MAX_RECLAIM_ACCOUNTS addresses.

tools.name: solknife_burn_nft_build
tools.description: Build chunked burn tx(s) for selected NFTs (pNFTs supported).

tools.name: solknife_swap_order
tools.description: Jupiter quote + unsigned swap tx. `amount` in input-mint base units. Returns the unsigned tx + lastValidBlockHeight + quote details.

tools.name: solknife_portfolio_compose_build
tools.description: Build a best-effort single auto-compose transaction for a target portfolio. Charges the configured compose fee when SOLKNIFE_FEE_ACCOUNT is set.

tools.name: solknife_ct_configure_build
tools.description: Build the Configure tx. Needs an agent-generated PubkeyValidity proof (96 B base64) + decryptable-zero AES ciphertext (36 B base64).

tools.name: solknife_ct_deposit_build
tools.description: Build the Deposit tx (public → confidential pending). `amount` in base units (u64 string).

tools.name: solknife_ct_apply_pending_build
tools.description: Build the ApplyPending tx. The agent-supplied `newDecryptableAvailable` (36 B AES base64) is what the worker computed.

tools.name: solknife_ct_empty_and_close_build
tools.description: Build the combined EmptyAccount + CloseAccount tx. Agent provides the 96 B base64 zero-ciphertext proof.

tools.name: solknife_ct_withdraw_build
tools.description: Build the 5-tx Withdraw saga. Agent supplies equality (320 B) + range U64 (936 B) proofs + new AES decryptable (36 B), plus the two ephemeral ctx-state pubkeys.

tools.name: solknife_ct_transfer_build
tools.description: Build the 5-tx Transfer saga. Agent supplies equality (320 B) + validity-3H (544 B) + range U128 (1000 B) proofs + auditor lo/hi ciphertexts (64 B each) + new AES decryptable (36 B), plus the three ephemeral ctx-state pubkeys.

tools.name: solknife_ct_orphans_build
tools.description: Build chunked CloseContextState tx(s) to reclaim orphan ZK ctx rent.

tools.name: solknife_swap_execute
tools.description: Submit a wallet-signed swap transaction. Returns the ExecuteOutcome (confirmed/failed/expired/unknown).

tools.name: solknife_portfolio_compose_execute
tools.description: Submit a wallet-signed portfolio compose transaction after top-level program allowlist verification.

tools.name: solknife_create_mint_execute
tools.description: Submit a wallet-signed create-mint tx. Structural re-verifier pins the mint creation ix + fee.

tools.name: solknife_mint_supply_execute
tools.description: Submit a wallet-signed mint-to tx. Structural re-verifier pins the mint-to ix + fee.

tools.name: solknife_create_account_execute
tools.description: Submit a wallet-signed ATA-create tx. Structural re-verifier pins the ATA creation ix(s) + allowlist.

tools.name: solknife_revoke_authority_execute
tools.description: Submit a wallet-signed revoke-authority tx. Structural re-verifier pins the revoke ix(s) + fee.

tools.name: solknife_change_authority_execute
tools.description: Submit a wallet-signed change-authority tx. Structural re-verifier pins the reassign ix(s) + fee.

tools.name: solknife_token_metadata_execute
tools.description: Submit a wallet-signed Metaplex metadata tx. Structural re-verifier pins the metadata ix + fee.

tools.name: solknife_reclaim_rent_execute
tools.description: Submit reclaim-rent close-batch tx(s) (signed). Each is re-verified against fresh on-chain state for the wallet's reclaimable accounts. Returns per-tx outcomes.

tools.name: solknife_burn_nft_execute
tools.description: Submit burn-nft tx(s) (signed). Structural re-verifier pins the burn ixs + fee per tx. Returns per-tx outcomes.

tools.name: solknife_ct_submit
tools.description: Submit a CT signed tx (single-tx ops) or saga (multi-tx ops). `op` discriminates. For saga ops (withdraw, transfer, reclaim-orphans) supply `signedTransactions` (an array); otherwise supply `signedTransaction`. The server re-verifies the saga shape + fee per op before relaying.

tools.name: solknife_arweave_upload_relay
tools.description: Upload a base64-encoded file to Arweave via SolKnife's funded Irys account. JSON-only — for agents without a wallet-adapter integration. Allowed contentType: image/png, image/jpeg, image/gif, image/webp, application/json. Max 2 MiB. Returns { arweaveTxId, arweaveUrl }.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_create_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned create-multisig tx. createKey is a fresh random pubkey the agent generates; it must co-sign the tx (two signers: creator + createKey). Returns the derived multisig + vault addresses, base64 v0 tx, and lastValidBlockHeight.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_create_execute
tools.description: Submit the signed create-multisig tx (signed by both the creator wallet and the createKey).

tools.name: solknife_multisig_propose_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned propose tx. kind=sol-transfer needs recipient+lamports; token-transfer needs mint+recipient+amount (base units); instructions takes raw inner instructions ({programId, accounts, data:base64}) whose payer is the vault PDA. The proposer auto-approves if they can vote.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_propose_execute
tools.description: Submit the signed propose-transaction tx.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_config_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned config-change proposal. op=add-member needs member (+optional permissions); remove-member needs member; change-threshold needs threshold. Only works on m-of-n multisigs (no single config authority).

tools.name: solknife_multisig_config_execute
tools.description: Submit the signed config-change proposal tx.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_state
tools.description: Read a Squads v4 multisig by address: members + permissions, threshold, vault balance, and pending proposals (vote tallies, who has voted, whether it can be executed). Returns null if the address is not a multisig.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_approve_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned vote tx: approve or reject the proposal at transactionIndex.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_approve_execute
tools.description: Submit the signed vote tx. Pass the same vote value used in the build.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_execute_build
tools.description: Build an unsigned execute tx for an APPROVED proposal at transactionIndex. The server detects vault vs config and returns executeKind; pass it to execute.execute. computeUnitLimit optionally raises the CU cap for heavy inner transactions.

tools.name: solknife_multisig_execute_execute
tools.description: Submit the signed execute-proposal tx. Pass the executeKind returned by execute.build.
